description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a combination of brick and light-colored siding on its exterior walls. The front features a small wooden porch with potted plants, a short fence, and a decorative vertical garden on the brick section. Windows are arranged in a regular grid pattern, with both single and double-pane styles, and the house includes a flat roof. The landscaping includes flower beds along the base of the house and a large deciduous tree nearby. The rear of the house has a larger deck area, also bordered by a low fence, and additional potted plants. The entryway is simple, with a single door and minimal ornamentation.
description: A two-story house with brick and siding exterior, flat roof, regular window arrangement, and landscaped with flower beds and a tree. Features a front porch, rear deck, and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entry door, vertical garden, flower beds, and a large tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by brick, with the main entry door and a grid of windows, minimal landscaping visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large deck, more siding than brick, and a prominent tree to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, additional windows, and flower beds along the base.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with a small wooden porch, potted plants, and a short fence; minimal decorative elements.
